title: Birthday Celebration

teamNote: Head of Design and Creative Operations

title: Birthday Celebration
name: Yevhenii Siechko
message: Wishing you an amazing year ahead filled with new ideas, meaningful achievements, and exciting opportunities!

title: Outstanding Achievement
reason: Exceptional delivery management work driving MGP-UA forward with remarkable dedication and results

from: Maria Plendukova + Veronika Yastrebova + Mikita Dzianisevich
reason: Collaborative excellence in cross-team coordination and delivery management across multiple projects

title: Data Science Excellence
reason: Outstanding contributions to MGP-UA data science initiatives and model development

title: QA Excellence
reason: Exceptional quality assurance work ensuring robust and reliable software delivery

title: AI-Powered Launch Week
headline: A/B/C/D Model Testing Goes Live
description: Our advanced machine learning models launch Monday with simultaneous testing of three different approaches. Inference workflows are optimized from hours to under 2 hours, with embeddings uploaded to Redis for real-time performance.

title: Infrastructure Excellence
headline: Massive Performance Breakthrough
description: Shared embedding optimization dramatically reduces inference run time from several hours to under two hours, enabling faster decision-making and improved user experience.

title: Data Quality Revolution
headline: Vector ID Management Overhaul
description: Resolved critical inconsistencies in user tracking by updating timestamps, cleaning outdated vector IDs, and implementing incremental updates. Active users are now explicitly linked to vector IDs for real-time monitoring.

title: Privacy & Compliance Focus
headline: Privacy-First Product Development
description: Privacy compliance features are being prioritized for sensitive markets, with focus on US regulations and enhanced privacy options to ensure product readiness.

title: Strategic Alignment Session
description: New process established for regular syncs between sales and product teams to address communication gaps and improve collaboration on mediation integrations. Focus on better publisher integrations and compliance with Google and Applovin.

title: Gaming Division Milestone
headline: Scorecard Automation Nearly Complete
description: 4 out of 9 scorecards and 5 out of 9 follow-throughs are ready, with most automation efforts expected to complete early next week. Independent scorecard system now aligned with business objectives.

articles.title: Technical Innovation Insights
articles.desc: Shared valuable technical resource for team learning and development

title: Team Support
headline: Family First Culture
quote: Thank you everyone who supported me... She is getting better and is expected to recover completely over the next 6-12 months
author: Pavel Golubev

title: Company Growth Trajectory
headline: Scaling Toward Ambitious Vision
description: With $20M EBITDA and 40% YoY growth projected, we're building toward our ambitious goal of becoming a $50B company with 1,500 employees across 100 studios.

title: AI Transformation Initiative
headline: AI Agent Revolution Coming
description: Every employee will manage 5-10 AI agents within 3-6 months. Our OKR Auditor already checks 1,000+ individual OKRs daily via AI, while Daria AI Bot saves $4k weekly analyzing app reviews.

title: Gaming Success Story
headline: Infinite Minesweeper Exceeds Benchmarks
description: Gaming division turned profitable in 2025, with Infinite Minesweeper achieving 61% retention (Apple benchmark: 151-160%), Solitaire v540 showing +21.67% D7 retention, and Crossword exceeding 200% ROAS.
takeaway: Gaming innovation drives exceptional user engagement

title: Security Excellence
headline: Fraud Detection Revolution
description: Dynamic SDK signatures reduced fraud from 22% to under 4%, dramatically improving platform security and user trust while protecting revenue integrity.

title: Learning Culture

prompt1: What's the most valuable insight you've gained from our Book Club discussions?
prompt2: How has 'Passionate Curiosity' influenced your approach to work?

title: Wellness & Balance
headline: Daily Yoga Sessions Continue
prompt1: Join Anna Kolyada daily at 13:10 CET for yoga - office and online streaming available
prompt2: Taking care of your wellbeing enhances both personal and professional performance
